summary: Added Codex project setup guide in AGENTS.md with uv/marimo workflow, validation commands, and canonical references.

Implemented DD-002 data-backed refactor: added new reference pipeline tables, replaced hardcoded notebook constants with DB queries, added capex->queue->in-service lag proxy and claim-evidence ledger.
Added ESIG-style probabilistic forecast fan chart in DD-002 and Methods & Reproducibility appendices (with source dates + SQL hash registries) in DD-002 and DD-001.
Implemented DD-001 lightweight uncertainty: guidance caveat bands in stats/prose, added uncertainty callout box, and validated notebook execution.

Audited README/AGENTS/CLAUDE/GEMINI architecture and persistence claims against src/python/htmlgraph implementation; collected line-level mismatches and corrections.
Researched local-first ecosystem options for HtmlGraph integration (Automerge, Yjs/pycrdt, Jazz, PowerSync, Zero, Turso) and mapped to FastAPI/SQLite architecture.
